## Summary

Describe the user-facing problem and the change that solves it.

## Testing

Describe the tests run and the devices or simulators used.

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept this pull request focused and linked any related issue.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for changed behaviour.
- [ ] The full unit and UI test suite passes locally.
- [ ] I checked VoiceOver, Dynamic Type, Reduce Motion, contrast, and touch targets where relevant.
- [ ] I added no personal health information, private recordings/photos, secrets, or unlicensed assets.
- [ ] I updated documentation for behaviour, architecture, privacy, or permission changes.
- [ ] I included before/after screenshots or a recording for visible UI changes.
